details: Table 1 in Yalkowsky 2014 lists Aniline -6 °C; DOI 10.1002/jps.24034 confirmed in paper.
Marek 2019 (bjoc.15.242) experimental: '22 (0.472 g, 32%) was isolated as a white solid (mp 179-183 C)' for compound 22 (4-hydroxypinan diphenylphosphine oxide).
Alsayari 2021 §3.1.2: '...afford target compound 2 at 90% yield; mp: 210-211 C'; DOI 10.3390/molecules26175383 confirmed.
Wirth 2024 §2.2.1 ImeTQ Sample: 'The onset temperature (Tonset) was constant and equal to 268.97 ± 0.13 °C'; DOI 10.3390/molecules29081724 confirmed.
Zhang 2002 (Molecules 7:681) compound 2b: 'Yield 57 %; Mp. 189-191°C' for 3-(2-furanyl)-6-(3-pyridyl)-triazolo-thiadiazole.
Gomez-Ayuso 2024 compound 7b: 'White solid (74%, 219 mg). M. p. 222-223 ºC.'; DOI 10.3762/bjoc.20.154 confirmed.
Paper 010 (ijms27041716) synthesis of 13: 'affording a cream-white solid (0.17 g, 94% yield). Mp 227-230 °C.'; DOI confirmed.
Paper 011 (molecules31040699) compound 2b: '5-Acetyl-2-ethyl-4-(3-fluorophenylamino)-6-phenylpyridazin-3(2H)-one, 2b Yield = 52%; mp = 174-175 °C'.
Paper 013 (molecules31040706) compound 5r: '6-(3-fluoro-4-nitrobenzyl)-6H-benzo[c]chromene (5r). Yield: 71%; Mp: 91 °C'.
Paper 062 (ijms12042448) Table 5 lists ethanol 78.3 °C as experimental BP; DOI confirmed.

Paper 099 (10.3390/60300194): 'The 2,4-dinitrophenylhydrazone derivative was recrystallised from ethyl acetate giving bright yellow crystals, m.p. 177-178 °C'; binds to syn-9-formyl precursor described immediately prior.
Norouzi 2024 (bjoc.20.241) compound 6f: 'yield: 153 mg (78%); mp 163-165 °C' for 11-(Butylamino)-12-phenyl-benzo[f]pyrrolo-triazolo-diazepine-carbonitrile.
Khan 2017 (10.15171/apb.2017.048) Table 2 shows Piroxicam-Urea co-former 132-135; Urea reported mp matches.
Muller 2020 (ma13204486) Table 5: 'Dodecane | 112-40-3 | Paraffin | 209.14 ± 1.45 | -10.2 ± 0.94 | -8 ± 0.25'; DSC peak value matches.
Paper 171 (molecules29122917) §3.12 compound 2e: 'white solid; mp 123.5-157.2 °C (CHCl3)'; unusual broad range matches paper exactly.
Paper 040 (80300342) compound 4b: '2-(4-Chlorocarbonylphenyl)-5-(6-cyanobenzothiazol-2-yl)thiophene (4b). Yield: 2.7 g (62%); m.p.>300°C'.
Liu 2024 (ph17010094): '...25DHB (203.60 °C and 207.19 °C)'; two DSC peaks for 2,5-dihydroxybenzoic acid confirmed.
Paper 020 (molecules29122942) compound 37: 'Rf = 0.25 (AcOEt), m.p. 118-120 °C (dec.)' confirmed from PDF.
Paper 069 (ijms27052306) carbohydrazide 2b: 'isolated as a white solid (30 mg, 25.34%). M.p.: 102-105 °C'.
Paper 067 (PMC6146921) Table 8: '8. 2-methyl-2-propanol 82.40' as experimental BP; PMC URL valid.
Paper 010 (ijms27041716) compound 21: 'to give a white solid (0.12 g, 77% yield). Mp 80-84 °C'.
Paper 037 (molecules16108788) compound 3 synthesis: '...dried to give a blue powder; mp 198 °C; yield 86%' for 6-Amino-2-(benzylsulfanyl)-5-nitrosopyrimidin-4-one.
Norouzi 2024 compound 5: '4H-Benzo[f][1,2,3]triazolo[1,5-a][1,4]diazepine (5)... mp 147-149 °C'.

Paper 113 (acsomega.6c01037) §2.3.13 'Synthesis of 2-(2-Acetoxy-4-methylphenyl)-2-oxoethyl acetate (10)' reports 'mp 46-48 °C' for the product; binding to section-header compound 10 is reasonable despite intra-text label inconsistency noted by extractor.
Paper 011 (molecules31040699) compound 5a: '5-Acetyl-2-ethyl-4-(4-methoxybenzylamino)-6-phenylpyridazin-3(2H)-one, 5a Yield = 57%; mp = 106-107 °C'.
